Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &Usuario = &Context.PesCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod //pega empresa logada para carregar o combo de empresas (Apenas no Start) - Depois pode ser alterada /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &FilaWhatsTip = nullvalue(&FilaWhatsTip) &FilaWhatsSts = nullvalue(&FilaWhatsSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Monitora Envio Emails' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &now = now() &FilaWhatsDtaEms1 = &now.AddDays(-30) EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'MostraTabelaAdminOuNao' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DetailWebComponent = !'' &ViewMensagem = !'' &ViewMensagem.Link = ViewFilaWhatsappItem.Link(EmpCod, FilaWhatsGUID) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAtualizaStatusWhatsapp' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportMonitoraEnvioWhatsapp.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = detailMensagesDaFila.Create(EmpCod, FilaWhatsGUID) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEms1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEnv1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaLim1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaUltTen1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEms1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEnv1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaLim1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaUltTen1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEms2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEnv2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaLim2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaUltTen2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEms2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEnv2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaLim2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaUltTen2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEms3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEnv3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaLim3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaUltTen3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEms3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaEnv3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaLim3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFilaWhatsDtaUltTen3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' &FilaWhatsDtaEms2.SetEmpty() &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' &FilaWhatsDtaEms3.SetEmpty() &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"EMPCOD" &EmpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILAWHATSTIP" &FilaWhatsTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILAWHATSSTS" &FilaWhatsSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILAWHATSMSGCRECOD" &FilaWhatsMsgCreCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILAWHATSDESTPESCOD" &FilaWhatsDestPesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' &FilaWhatsDtaEms1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' &FilaWhatsDtaEnv1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' &FilaWhatsDtaLim1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"EMPCOD", "", not &EmpCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &EmpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILAWHATSTIP", "", not &FilaWhatsTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilaWhatsTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILAWHATSSTS", "", not &FilaWhatsSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilaWhatsSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILAWHATSMSGCRECOD", "", not &FilaWhatsMsgCreCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilaWhatsMsgCreCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILAWHATSDESTPESCOD", "", not &FilaWhatsDestPesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilaWhatsDestPesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaEms1.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaEms1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaEnv1.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaEnv1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaLim1.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaLim1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaUltTen1.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaEms2.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaEms2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaEnv2.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaEnv2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaLim2.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaLim2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaUltTen2.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAEMS' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaEms3.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaEms3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaEms_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAENV' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaEnv3.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaEnv3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaEnv_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTALIM' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaLim3.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaLim3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaLim_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILAWHATSDTAULTTEN' AND not (&FilaWhatsDtaUltTen3.IsEmpty() AND &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FilaWhatsDtaUltTen_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"EmpresaCompleto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoPararEnvio' prcCancelaEnvioBoletosPendentesWhats(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod) EndEvent Event CancelarPendentes.Click prcCancelaEnvioBoletosPendentesWhats(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod) EndEvent Sub 'MostraTabelaAdminOuNao' if &Context.Old_Perfil <> 3 // suporte pnladmin.Visible = false &EmpCod.visible = false endif EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
